title: desmodium rubrum
intro: Desmodium rubrum, also known as Red Clover or Rosin Weed, is a perennial legume native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Desmodium rubrum include reducing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Desmodium rubrum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
